body: ## [4.0.7](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/compare/v4.0.6...v4.0.7) (2017-07-06) ### Bug Fixes * **results:** revert commit that ensure hits are returned only if right indices (algolia/react-instantsearch#149) ([a11b2be](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/a11b2be))
